  • Powered By

    • Edgeworkers intervene at Leverage Points to Reorder complex adaptive systems. This unleashes intelligent evolution through conscious Transformation. But where are the Leverage Points, and who are the Agents? And what is Transformation?

    • Death starts when internal change happens slower than external change.

      - David M. Keirsey

    • I am here. I have some agency, some capacity to do something about what is going on. I don't know how, yet, but I sense how real and dire the threats are. From this moment on, I am not going to let myself do anything other than figure out how I can reorder the world, and then I will act according to what I figure out. If what I first try is insufficient, then I will figure out the next thing to do that works better. I want people to feel the depression and the outrage and the fear about what is happening in the world, because it means that they love the sacredness of life and are not just deadening themselves and fragmenting inside to go numb. I cannot focus on the 'bad guy' over there, and I cannot let myself stop or not act because 'I don't know how'. I also cannot just act doing things that I know won't work to reorder the world. This means I have to learn by talking with other people who are also trying to figure out what to do. If life was not actually beautiful and meaningful and sacred to me, I would not care that it is being destroyed. This means I don't need to act out of anger, depression and fear. I can act out of my sense of the sacred, being in service to a World that is beautiful. These are times when there is a higher consequence to my actions than there has ever been for humans. There is an obligation and meaningfulness to taking action that I do not want to waste. It may seem like I am becoming radical, but actually I am doing the only thing that is sane in a world that has become completely crazy. My social media, and bills, and ordinary mundane life will continue to push on me with their same neurotic desire for my attention, but they are all wrong. How does any of that matter? I will not be able to counter all the messages and media by memory and will alone. But I can change the feed of what is coming into my awareness so that increasing my agency for making a difference is what comes into my awareness every day. I can make sure that the truest thing I know is what gets my attention the most. I can change the close circle of people around me to those who are also taking action. Then what is most true and meaningful is what I am reminded of the most each day, and I am aligned with my real self.

       https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4kBoLVvoqVY

    • OUR MISSION IS TO SUDDENLY REORDER COMPLEX ADAPTIVE SYSTEMS

      Collapsing the few massive hierarchical power structures into many small self-authorizing self-organizing toroids brings simplicity and diversity, and a chance for humans to carefully regenerate ecosystems. Without fossil-fuel-powered transportation, if it is not created locally it does not exist.

      By learning to suddenly reorder yourself, you become a map by which you can navigate the sudden reordering of seemngly unchangeable systems.

      WHAT IS TRANSFORMATION

      People frivolously throw about the term 'transformation' without recognizing that transformation is the the 'death and possible resurrection show'.

      Most people and organizations avoid transformation like the plague, even while they might recognize that the purpose of the Universe is evolution.

      If someone offers transformation to a person or an organization, they are immediately and without further consideration, categorized as a 'terrorist'. A Century ago, the perjorative term used was 'witch'.

      The curriculum of School could be about learning to transform. It could be about building matrix for being able to Disidentify and still maintain sane cognition. It could be about skilling up to navigate uncontexted spaces and the great unknown while staying consciously responsible and relational enough to produce valuable results.

      Eash aspect of transformational requires developing extraordinary skills, such as Navigating Space, Setting Context, conscious Declaring, and Inner Navigating personal and Archetypal Resources so as to be the space through which your Archetypal Lineage can do its work in the world.

      Transformation involves Starting Over. If you do not Start Over, then you are being and doing and relating in the same way you were being and doing and relating before, painted green.

      The shift from your current state to a new state only occurs through a non-defineable and uncontrollable Liquid State. If there is no Liquid State in one or more of your 5 Bodies (intellectual, physical, emotional, energetic, archetypal) then there is no transformation.

      Stop fooling yourself about this. Paying 'lip service' to transformation is not transformation.

      Understanding transformation is not transformation.

      Saying that it would be a good idea if someone else over there would transform is not transformation.

      Transformation cannot be made either 'safe' or 'comfortable'. The rug is pulled out. There is Nothing to stand on. The Eye Of The Needle is too small for any of your psycho-emotional Baggage to fit through. Either your Baggage will be left behind, or you will be left behind. Asshole Training and Flying School might be a good idea for you.

      Transformation is not an end state. It is a 'through' state. The Survival Strategy that seemed so important and valuable when you first invented it suddenly changes from your rescuer to your prison. Your greatest 'ace up your sleeve' may be your talent for Disillusionment.

      We recommend that you Hit Bottom and never come up. Then you will be more connected with reality solidly enough that you don't superficially skip from one Fantasy World to another Fantasy World.

      12 LEVERAGE POINTS BY DANELLA MEADOWS

      Book: Thinking In Systems by Donella Meadows.

      Article: Leverage Points: places to intervene in a system by Donella Meadows

      PLACES TO INTERVENE IN A SYSTEM

      (in increasing order of effectiveness)

      12. Constants, parameters, numbers (such as subsidies, taxes, standards).

      11. The sizes of buffers and other stabilizing stocks, relative to their flows.

      10. The structure of material stocks and flows (such as transport networks, population age structures).

      9. The lengths of delays, relative to the rate of system change.

      8. The strength of negative feedback loops, relative to the impacts they are trying to correct against.

      7. The gain around driving positive feedback loops.

      6. The structure of information flows (who does and does not have access to information).

      5. The rules of the system (such as incentives, punishments, constraints).

      4. The power to add, change, evolve, or self-organize system structure.

      3. The goals of the system.

      2. The mindset or paradigm out of which the system — its goals, structure, rules, delays, parameters — arises.

      1. The power to transcend paradigms.

      Here are some examples of leverage points to intervene in different types of complex systems:

      Economic Systems

      • Changing the Rules: Adjusting tax policies, subsidies, or regulations to incentivize more sustainable business practices and discourage harmful activities.
      • Enabling Self-Organization: Decentralizing economic decision-making and empowering local communities to develop their own economic models.
      • Adjusting Feedback Loops: Improving transparency and feedback mechanisms to hold corporations and governments accountable for environmental and social impacts.

      Environmental Systems

      • Changing Information Flows: Increasing public access to environmental data and scientific information to drive more informed decision-making.
      • Adjusting Feedback Loops: Restoring natural feedback loops, such as wetlands that regulate flooding, to increase system resilience.
      • Changing System Goals: Shifting the primary goal from economic growth to environmental sustainability and ecosystem health.

      Social Systems

      • Changing the Rules: Reforming laws, policies, and social norms to promote equity, inclusion, and human rights.
      • Enabling Self-Organization: Supporting the self-organization of marginalized communities to amplify their voices and agency.
      • Changing Mindsets: Challenging dominant cultural narratives and paradigms that perpetuate social inequities.

      Technological Systems

      • Changing Information Flows: Improving data transparency and user control over personal information in digital platforms.
      • Adjusting Feedback Loops: Designing algorithmic systems with robust feedback mechanisms to detect and mitigate unintended consequences.
      • Changing System Goals: Shifting the priorities of technology development from profit maximization to social and environmental wellbeing.The most effective leverage points often involve changing the underlying rules, goals, and mindsets that shape the behavior of complex systems, rather than just adjusting parameters or numbers. However, identifying and implementing these high-leverage interventions requires a deep understanding of system dynamics and the courage to challenge entrenched power structures.

      THE POSSIBILITY TO SUDDENLY REORDER

      Certain complex adaptive systems are sustained by the energy that flows through them. Think of a hurricane, or an ecosystem, or the human mind. Ilya Prigogine named this a 'dissipative structure'. It earned him the Nobel Prize.

      If a dissipative structure is properly perturbed, it can reconfigure to a new modality.

      If the disturbance is insufficiently accurate or powerful, the system quickyly recovers its stability in its current configuration and nothing changes.

      If the disturbance is too large, the system is thrown into complete disorder and can no longer function as a recognizeable system, its component parts disassociating from each other.

      But within a specific range of perturbation, the system is destabilized from its current mode, does not completely spin apart, and then reorders itself. Since energy has been added to the system, the new energy must be incorporated somehow. Managing the new energy forces the system to reorder to a higher level of elegance, intelligence, awareness, sensitivity, and capability for interaction. Since, "Intelligence is the ability to interact" (Joseph Chilton Pearce), the system becomes more intelligent.

      The skillset for optimally perturbing a human being so hesh (he/she) reorders to higher levels of adulthood consciousness and therefore responsibility, is called 'Possibilitator', 'Possibility Coach', or 'Trainer'.

      The skillset for optimally perturbing a human gameworld (such as a family, school, company, hospital, government, religion, village, neighborhood, culture, etc.) so it reorders to a higher level of awareness and ability to regenerate Earth, is called 'Gameworld Consultant'.

      Since most human beings remain uninitiated into adulthood, and most gameworlds are not contexted in the Bright Principle of Transformation, the human psychological construct, and the gameworld, reflexively (unconsciously, mechanically) defend themselves from being perturbed.

      Human beings are designed to evolve, but human evolution can only begin after the Point Of Origin is moved out of the context of defending the childhood Survival Strategy and into ongoing creative adulthood healing and initiatory processes . In other words, human beings are designed to continuously evolve in awareness of consequences of actions and inactions, compassion, and the ability to interact. This is very different from 'learning' in the ordinary school sense of intellectual understanding. It is more aligned with 'becoming'.

      Gameworlds can be designed for transformation, but only if their power structure is prevented from functioning as a hierarchy (which will automatically be hijacked by psychopathic personalities) and instead functions as a torus, and also, if the Codex and Rules Of Engagement of the gameworld are contexted in the Bright Principle of Transformation. In other words, evolutionary gameworlds must also evolve.

      In both evolutionary human adulthood and transformational gameworlds, new unfamiliar skillsets are required to face into and provide powerful possibility so that the defenses against reordering are either transcended (healed) or transformed. Otherwise both humans and gameworlds return to their pre-perturbed sleeping state, or else the Transformational process quickly shifts into war.

      The proposition is that if a person successfully learns to be a Possibilitator and/or Gameworld Consultant, the world around them will also reorder into higher forms, plus, when the person transforms, the morphogenetic field of the human race will reflexively be perturbed and will upgrade, making the skills and thoughtware they just obtained available to the entire globe.

      HEALING TRAUMA AND SHIFTING FROM DEFENSIVE TO EXPANSIVE

      Individuals and small groups have the freedom to take evolutionary actions unrestricted by gameworld defenses if their actions are beneath the radar of the existing gameworlds. Essentially, this means that if the actions build something new 'over there' without attacking the currently existing gameworld, there is no conflict.

      This follows Buckminster Fuller's modernized recommendation: "You don't change things by fighting against the existing gameworlds. You change things by cavitating and inhabiting new gameworlds that make the existing gameworlds irrelevant. Existing gameworlds are already obsolete."

      Yet both internal and external challenges for the rapidly emerging Person Of Agency are still massive, even if the challenges do not come from existing systems trying to 'protect' themselves. The purpose of this website is to report on numerous attempts at originating Archan cultures during the past half Century, their learnings and their outcomes, with the idea of better formulating the challenge at hand, and supporting those Edgeworkers engaged in this work to better succeed.

      DEMOLISHING OBSOLETE GAMEWORLDS

      An additional profession is currently emerging: Gameworld Demolisher.

      This is the same function which is being effectively delivered by the armed and trained female Akashinga soldiers in their removal of poachers to protect elephants, rhinoceros, and other wildlife in Africa. The poachers have created a gameworld of entering national parks and animal preserves, killing lions, tigers, elephants, rhinocerous and other animals, hacking off parts, and selling them to Chinese markets. They think of their gameworld as a 'business', justifying it with the idea that, "Everyone has a right to make a living." The Akashinga disagree, and have become expert at demolishing the poachers' gameworlds, even if this necessitates demolishing the poacher in the process. The Stand of the Akashinga serves a higher purpose than the Stand of the poachers.

      Demoloshing obsolete gameworlds is central to the Maori word: Kaitiakitanga, meaning, Guardianship. 'Kaitiaki' means 'Guardian'.

      To assure the survival and reflourishing of life on Earth, this same citizen-organized-and-funded lethal-level protection needs to be implemented to guard forests from being cut down for palm oil, soy, or beef production, mountains from being blown up for coal or rare minerals for electric car batteries, fracking holes from being drilled which contaminate water tables, plastics from being manufactured or imported which are burned in electric power plants and then fill the oceans with PCBs and biphenyls making ocean dead zones, GMO terminator seeds from being created, on and on. All of these crisis combine their lethal threats into the 'perfect storm' (the 'polycrisis') raging towards extermination of the human race and possiblly most of life on Earth.

      Where are the Akashinga? The brave ones? Are you ready to come to life?

      An 'Obsolete Gameworld' is 'any gameworld that is not regenerating Earth's ecosystems'. An 'Obsolete Gameworld' is any gameworld that takes away from an ecosystem or harms it in any way.

      Another way to define this is: an 'Obsolete Gameworld' is 'any gameworld that does not follow Archan Law.'

      Archan Law is the basis for the Regenerate Earth Goals (REGs) replacing the faux gesture made by the United Nations and their failed Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

      Obsolete Gameworlds are subject to 'Universal Jurisdiction'. Universal jurisdiction is a legal principle that allows states or international organizations to claim criminal jurisdiction over an accused person regardless of where the alleged crime was committed, and regardless of the accused's nationality, country of residence, or any other relation to the prosecuting entity. Crimes prosecuted under universal jurisdiction are considered crimes against all, too serious to tolerate jurisdictional arbitrage.

      Obsolete Gameworlds are being dissolved by both internal and external agents, including Bounty Hunters, and Gameworld Demolishers.

    • You don't change things by fighting against the existing gameworlds. You change things by cavitating and inhabiting new gameworlds that make the existing gameworlds irrelevant. The existing gameworlds are already obsolete.

      - R. Buckminster Fuller

    • SitRep (Situation Report)

      Below is a list of attempts that humans beings are making to exit the grip of modern culture's capitalist patriarchal empire Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.), while simultaneously cavitating and inhabiting Regenerative Human Culture. These are the system hackers, not just in theory, but in personal and organizational reality. Where are the gameworld builders, designing and inhabiting regenerative culture. Complete social reordering is required NOW. Who are the players? What are their cutting edge efforts? There are many offers for education, even for communities organized around a set ideas such as Permaculture, or The Art of Hosting, or The Work That Reconnects. However, new understanding does not cause new behavior, just like new technology does not regenerate nature. What is required is context shift that originates entirely new social infrastructure, occupying new culture space, and opening bridges to bring others across the chaos of the Phoenix Process. The argument that 'it won't build the economy' has lost all legitimacy and credibility. It is time to stop being gullible.

      1972 CLUB OF ROME - Donella Meadows et. al.

      Our goal is to actively advocate for paradigm and systems shifts which will enable society to emerge from our current crises, by promoting a new way of being human, within a more resilient biosphere. It is an established, respected, international think-tank positioned to face the core challenges of the 21st Century. Today, existing frameworks such as the UN Agenda 2030, designed to address the complex challenges we face, are not meeting expectations. There is a sense of stuckness, as if we were incapable of getting out of an extractive and exploitative model which, as pointed out by UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres, wages war on life and will lead to the suicide of humanity. 

      THE FIFTH ELEMENT: What would make regenerative organisations viable and widespread?The concept of The Fifth Element emanates the determination to safeguard Life. It has dreams that are built on life-inspired learning, drawing equally from indigenous science and cutting-edge research. People of all ages and backgrounds are invited to collaborate to learn how to approach humanity’s existential concerns in their own unique ways as learners and teachers, citizens and experts.  ​The Fifth Element aims to shift focus from stakeholders to people as human beings, from teaching to learning, from colonial mindsets to self-organisation, from scarcity, competition, and dispossession, to abundance, collaboration and emergence. It aims to foster new meanings and dissonance rather than being limited to problem and solution – oriented mindsets.

      EARTH4ALL: The dominant economic model is destabilising societies and the planet.

      It is time for change. Earth4All is a vision. We hope everybody will use it to make better choices for people and the planet. The model illustrates how key social and planetary dimensions interact, and provides a realistic path to wellbeing for all on our planet. The book proposes five extraordinary turnarounds, and fifteen policy “levers” to achieve such a vision. We hope to inspire people to demand change and address the current lack of imagination of our political and economic debate. Ultimately, we want governments to re-program our economies. We hope to provide further momentum to many existing initiatives that already produce prospects of hope in all corners of the world.

      WEBSITES: clubofrome.org and earth4all.life and thefifthelement.earth

      VIDEO: The Last Call youtube.com/watch?v=gt4WsMfi6d0

      BOOK: Limits To Growth by Donella Meadows et. al.

      SITREP: Club Of Rome is willing to recognize that their previous efforts have failed to wake 'people' up enough to change (meaning those 'people' at the top of global hierarchies, meaning psychopathic personalities, who in reality have no incentive to change anything that does not bring them more power and security).

      CHALLENGE: Club Of Rome has defined all of their initiatives as an advocacy think tank. Psychopaths laugh at them. Nothing will change. At the same time, it seems as if the Club Of Rome constrains itself to efforts that defend the right of profit for the corporate world. Their Earth4All and The Fifth Element initiatives rotate to the smell of money for big corporations. Club Of Rome has not recognized that profit and the biosphere are incompatible. They continue to weave the illusion.

      PROPOSAL: Use Dynamic Facilitation and Choice Creating in a Torus Meeting Technology setting to identify what must change immediately in order to set a path for a future that includes human presence on Earth - not in a society as currently formulated, with so-called nation states, corporate personhood, legalized warfare, profit motivated economics, etc. - but given completely free and open space of possibilities to choose from. And then enforce these imperatives for the survival of life on Earth through women with guns. Wash, rinse, repeat. Keep rapidly iterating in multiple parallel experiments to innovate regenerative human culture on Earth now.

      Club Of Rome Website
      The Fitfh Element Website

      1973 BRIDGE-HOUSES

      Synergetic education and temporary community.

      WEBSITE: bridge-house.mystrikingly.com

      VIDEO: The Emergence of Bridge-House youtu.be/M9J7wMN0aPY

      SITREP: Bridge-Houses exist, skills are increasing, there are a growing numbers of Bridge-Houses in the Americas and Europe.

      CHALLENGE: Requires Radical Responsibility and Radical Freedom combined. A Bridge-House is a short term projects, so it can be easy to 'fake it' until the project ends. Requires a skilled Spaceholder.

      PROPOSAL: Spread the Bridge-House possibility to trained young people.

      Bridge-Houses
      Bridge-House Rancho Campo

      1976 SCHOOL OF LOST BORDERS - Meredith Little/Steven Foster

      Bringing meaningful rites of passage into the modern world through vision fasts, trainings, and transformative nature-based programs.

      WEBSITE: shooloflostborders.org

      SITREP: Fully active, continues to slowly expand from California into Europe.

      CHALLENGE: Facilitators of a personal transformation process that is contexted in 'the modern world', western and indigenous patriarchal cultures. There is no stand to shift people to regenerative culture, merely to better adapt to modern culture. Lacking an Archan definition of adulthood.

      PROPOSAL: Context shift out of the modern Capitalist Patriarchal Empire and into Archiarchy.

      School Of Lost Borders Website
      Lost Borders Press

      1976 & 1978 Safespace Projects with Bob & Marilyn Miles

      WEBSITE:

      SITREP:

      CHALLENGE:

      PROPOSAL:

      Archan Permaculture

      1979-2024 Context.Org - Stepping Stones - Robert Gilman

      WEBSITE: context.org

      SITREP: Currently changing modus, adding a blog.

      PROPOSAL: Expand to include authentic adulthood initiatory processes based on the context and content of this work.

      CHALLENGE: To shift from new understanding to living and interacting in a new culture.

      Context.org Website

      1995 Global Ecovillage Network (GEN) - Hildur & Ross Jackson et. al.

      GEN is a solution-based, multi-stakeholder alliance providing information, tools, and examples demonstrating principles and practices of sustainability in lifestyles and communities, designing pathways to a sustainable future while building bridges of hope and international solidarity.

      Through the sharing of best practices and innovative solutions and the honoring of deep-rooted traditional knowledge and local cultures, GEN builds bridges between policy-makers, academics, entrepreneurs and sustainable community networks across the globe in order to develop strategies for a global transition to resilient communities and cultures. Our goals are:

      • To advance the education of individuals from all walks of life by sharing the experience and best practices gained from the networks of ecovillages and sustainable communities worldwide.
      • To advance human rights, conflict resolution, and reconciliation by empowering local communities to interact globally, while promoting a culture of mutual acceptance and respect, effective communications, and cross-cultural outreach.
      • To advance environmental protection globally by serving as a think tank, incubator, international partner organization, and catalyst for projects that expedite the shift to sustainable and resilient lifestyles.
      • To advance citizen and community participation in local decision-making, influencing policy-makers, and educating the public, to accelerate the transition to sustainable living.

      WEBSITE: ecovillage.org

      SITREP: GEN is composed of 5 regional networks, and the youth arm, NextGEN, spanning the globe. The network is made up of approximately 10,000 communities and related projects where people are living together in greater ecological harmony. Some network members include large networks like Sarvodaya (2,000 active sustainable villages in Sri Lanka); the Federation of Damanhur in Italy, and REDES in Senegal; as well as small rural ecovillages like Gaia Asociación in Argentina and Huehuecoyotl in Mexico. It also includes urban rejuvenation projects like Los Angeles EcoVillage and Christiania in Copenhagen; permaculture design sites such as Crystal Waters, Australia, Cochabamba, Bolivia and Barus, Brazil; and educational centres such as Findhorn in Scotland, Centre for Alternative Technology in Wales, Earthlands in Massachusetts, and many more.

      CHALLENGE: GEN remains in the 'education' paradigm, and in reality, defends the 'Sustainable Development Goals' (SDGs). GEN has hot shifted to Regenerate Earth Goals (REGs). Who, then, is supposed to do the dirty work? Who should step in and cause the requisite 'breakdown' before any true breakthrough can occur? Who will navigate transformational liquid states? GEN does not include Transformation as a core Bright Principle, so it does not facilitate personal or organizational transformation. Instead GEN 'consults about improving strategies', 'sharing experiences and best practices', leaving humanity stranded in the grips of current economic and political control-and-command hierarchies which are incapable of perceiving the dire incentives to transform. With all its formidible human resources and brand recognition, GEN could become a force to reckon with, bigger than the United Nations, like Akashinga.

      PROPOSAL: Shift to Archiarchy. Reorder the GEN power structure from a hierarchy to a torus. Take a stand for nonmaterial economics. Learn to create Transformation Spaces that liberate creative evolutionary chaos rather than curated conferences with entertainment.

      Global Ecovillage Network (GEN) Website

      1996 PACHAMAMA ALLIANCE - John Perkins, Lynne & Bill Twist

      Pachamama Alliance is a global community that offers people the chance to learn, connect, engage, travel and cherish life for the purpose of creating a sustainable future that works for all. With roots deep in the Amazon rainforest, our programs integrate Indigenous wisdom with modern knowledge to support personal, and collective, transformation that is the catalyst to bringing forth an environmentally sustainable, spiritually fulfilling, socially just human presence on this planet. We offer 3 courses:

      AWAKENING THE DREAMER: In this 90-minute course, take an honest look at the challenging state of the world, reflect, and discover opportunities to create a new future where you have a key role to play.

      GAME CHANGER INTENSIVE: An 8-week online course that connects you with others around the world and prepares you to engage in effective collective action toward a just and sustainable future.

      INTRODUCTION TO COMMUNITY CLIMATE ACTION: A 10-week training for Game Changer Intensive graduates that focuses on developing key skills for local community action and climate justice.

      WEBSITE: pachamama.org

      SITREP: Symposiums have been held in at least 78 countries in 13 languages, with more than 4,000 volunteers offering the content in homes, churches, businesses, community centers, and government agencies. In late 2011, we expanded the reach of the Symposium through a partnership with the sustainable lifestyle company, Gaiam, to offer DVD and online versions.

      In late 2013, we began the next era of our educational work with new educational programs for people to develop themselves as leaders for social and environmental change.

      3-7 June 2024, Pachamama Alliance sponsored an extraordinary event in Asheville, North Carolina, that brought together 65 visionaries, experts, and activists to collaborate on finding creative new pathways to a viable future for humanity and our planet... to 'Seed The Change'. In the latter half of the gathering, participants formed teams to develop actionable initiatives, which were dubbed 'Earthshots' - interventions with the potential to create breakthroughs on a global scale. Eight Earthshot teams created a brilliant array of strategies. The Earthshot teams are organizing themselves to fully develop their visions and to delve deeper into the pathways that hold the greatest transformational promise. With support from Pachamama Alliance, their goal is to have plans ready by the end of the summer 2024 to begin seeking funding, resources, and new alliances.

      CHALLENGE: Trainings focus on combatting climate change, which is only one head of the Medussa of the 'polycrisis'. Pachamama is centered in Capitalist Patriarchal Empire. If someone is ready to Awaken and Change Their Dream, they are ready to shift into next culture, into Archiarchy. But what does Pachamama offer in terms of what to move into?

      PROPOSAL: Take a Stand that Pachamama.org is a bridge to Archiarchy. Build out the Archan culture space big enough for graduates of Game Changer Intensive to move into it and live there. Bring your 4,000 trainers together and invite them to relocate their Point Of Origin to Archiarchy. Then they can expand and deepen their trainer work, serving as a Bridge To Next Culture. They can learn to deliver Rage Club, Fear Club, Possibility Team, and Emotional Healing Processes (EHP). They can provide enough Nonmaterial Value that they can quit their corporate jobs and thrive in Archan Economics.

      Pachamama Alliance Website

      1998 POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT (PM)- Clinton Callahan et. al.

      Provides thoughtware for Archiarchy, the radically responsible initiation-centered nonmaterial value regenerative culture naturally emerging around the world now that Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course. Archiarchy is archetypally initiated adult women creatively collaborating with archetypally initiated adult men. Possibility Management trainings start with Expand The Box training, followed by 10 or more Possibility Labs. Participants heal from childhood wounds and Build Matrix through initiatory experiences until they are able to source the context of Archiarchy, and build gameworlds through which they can deliver the services of their Bright Principles and Archetypal Lineage. All is open code copyleft. We offer the Distinctionary, PM Thoughtmaps, PM Processes, 3 Phase Healing, Torus Meeting Technology, Conscious Feelings, Emotional Healing Processes (EHP), Rage Club, Fear Club, Possibility Team, Gameworld Building, Gameworld Consulting, and 650+ websites and over 6,000 Experiments to try in the StartOver.xyz thoughtware-upgrade game, plus many online WorkTalks, Workshops, and Groups.

      WEBSITE: possibilitymanagement.org and possibilitymanagement.mystrikingly.com

      SITREP: Global community mostly in the Americas and Europe. Slowly increasing its rate of growth and acceptance. Well documented. Monthly newsletters to 4,000 subscribers. The only organization we have found to take a powerful stand for the necessity to move out of Patriarchy and into regenerative initiation-centered nonmaterial-value Archiarchy.

      2015 Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) - United Nations

      The 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development, adopted by all United Nations Member States in 2015, provides a shared blueprint for peace and prosperity for people and the planet, now and into the future. At its heart are the 17 Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), which are an urgent call for action by all countries - developed and developing - in a global partnership. They recognize that ending poverty and other deprivations must go hand-in-hand with strategies that improve health and education, reduce inequality, and spur economic growth – all while tackling climate change and working to preserve our oceans and forests.

      2023 Regenerate Earth Goals (REGs)

      Going all out together bringing Earth ecosystems back to full vibrant health and diversity can be done. Already in 2008 the people of Estonia cleaned up their country and cleaned up ten-thousand tons of garbage in one day! There are already concerted intelligent efforts by millions of people around the world doing what is right to create a better future for life on Earth. At REGs we do not have to reinvent the wheel. People are destroying weapons so there can be no more war. People are depaving downtown and planting gardens and making walkways and bike paths. People are guarding old growth trees in Chile threatened by corporate greed from Esprit. People are blowing up tar sands oil pipelines.     • Thoughtmap of Epochal Culture Shift

      Understanding the natural emergence of Archiarchy after Matriachy and Patriarchy have run their course.

    • Breakdowns: Failure Mode Analysis

      So much effort went into ratifying the SDGs in 2015. One would have wanted them to shine with integrity and accountability... integrity to Earth... not to the 'stakeholders'.

      However, we start where we are.

      Consciousness evolves and human awareness expands according to the Evolutionary mandate of the Universe.

      Once the SDGs are inspected, it becomes obvious why the United Nations itself has thankfully come to admit, "The Sustainable Development Goals are badly off track."

      Radical Honesty gives us a more accurate assessment of current reality with which our combined efforts can produce better results.

      But where did the intentions go wrong?

      Below is a simple effort to consider circumstances and forces which undermined the SDGs from the beginning. The objective here is not to point the finger of blame. The intention is for us all to wake up about what has been really going on, and to get back on track with the tasks at hand.

      Think of what is at stake: everything you have ever known or loved.

      Either your world evolves, or it dies.

      Both may feel the same at first, but there is a world of difference between Emotional fear and the Feeling of fear. Emotions last longer than 3 minutes in your experience. Emotions are for healing things. Feelings are for handling things. You can learn to distinguish between Emotions and Feelings in your daily life.

      Learning to consciously feel helps to properly consider the fallacies undermining the original 17 SDGs, and to use your newfound wisdom to try to do better with implementing the REGs.

      NOTE: These fallacies are not listed in any particular order.

      MOLOCH - THE ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE POWERED SUPERORGANISM

      (Notes from Daniel Schmachtenberger 2023 Sweden)

      It is clear that if the 100 trillion dollars we currently exchange each day does not grow exponential we would not keep up with interest and the financial system as we know it would collapse. This financial system that the world now uses to meet our basic needs is obviously incompatible with the biosphere.

      The market thinks of money as a token for 'game theoretic optionality'. Money has no intrinsic value, but it has a maximum optionality to get me any type of value I want. I can get militaries with it. I can get media influence with it. I can change people's minds with it. I can get weapons and technology with it. I can get any materials I want with it, and, because I don't know how the environment is going to change, the speed of my adaptive response is the most important thing an OODA Loop.

      An 'O.O.D.A. Loop' is a decision-making framework developed by military strategist John Boyd that consists of four stages: Observe, Orient, Decide, and Act. It is an iterative process that helps individuals and organizations make effective decisions in rapidly changing, competitive environments by continuously cycling through these stages.

      Ideally I cycle through my OODA Loop more rapidly than an opponent or competitor, I gain an advantage. By making decisions and acting more quickly, I can 'get inside' the other party's decision cycle.

      The OODA loop has been applied in various domains beyond the military, including business strategy, cybersecurity, emergency response, and personal decision-making.

      To optimize my OODA Loop response, I don't want a lot of materials that might become less useful hanging around. What I do want is a lot of optionality, so that I can have whatever I want without delay. In short, I don't want a lot of inventory or infrastructure. What I want is a lot of money, because money gives me optionality to gain any value I want.

      Modern culture only values what is measurable, extractable, and exchangeable. In comparison, the types of value that you'll really care about on your deathbed are not measurable, extractable, and exchangeable. Humans are destroying all those nonmaterial types of value in the pursuit of the material values.

      Nonmaterial value is being killed through a decentralized incentive system that is incenting all eight billion humans to figure out how to get more money, because everything else they want and need to exist requires money.

      Countries are competing relative to each other, companies are competing relative to each other, people are competing relative to each other, all to get more money. They are all incentivized to innovate and to optimize existing innovations to get more money for themselves. The desire for more money sends them to search for AI empowered optimization algorithms for getting more money any way they can.

      You can think of the whole global market as something like a clever AI system that is running parallel process on human capacity to compute. Running parallel process in the global computer cloud is radically more powerful than running a super computer. But now wer are running parallel process on eight billion human beings. Clusters of corporations and countries and private projects incentivize them all to search for or create new ways to make money, and to optimize on existing ways.

      Whoever gets good at a system for gaining more option tokens also gains more power, and then, in turn, lobbies for particular laws and changes cultural values through the media they own in order to distort existing systems in their favor. They naturally use their full power to make a system that is better for them. Anyone who opposes their new system is also opposing those who are doing well at making more money. So they use some of their token-empowered agency to suppress your opposition.

      You can think of the global market as a Super Intelligence that is already misaligned with planetary well-being. This super intelligence is simultaneously using the parallel computing power of all eight billion human beings to build Narrow AI in its own service.

      'Narrow AI' is a type of Artificial Intelligence specifically designed to perform a singular task or a limited set of related tasks. Unlike General AI, which aims to replicate human cognitive abilities across various domains, Narrow AI operates within a defined scope and follows pre-established rules. It excels in specific functions but lacks the ability to generalize knowledge or adapt to tasks outside its programming.

      Clearly, with eight billion people focusing all creative efforts in parallel on building the fastest and fiercest Narrow AI so that you make more money than anyone else is an aberration of human spirit.

      Most of the Nazis were not Hitler. They were people just trying to pay their bills, do the right thing, fit in, follow orders, and not get punished. The Hitler we are all in relationship to today is this Super Intelligence, this superorganism, this megamachine, made up of all of us trying to make more money any way we can so we have the most options and the least overhead.

      This superorganism... you can call it Moloch.

      Moloch refers to a deity from ancient Semitic cultures, particularly associated with the Canaanites and Phoenicians. Worship of Moloch was characterized by the practice of child sacrifice, where parents would offer their children as sacrifices to appease this god.

      In addition to its historical and religious significance, the name 'Moloch' has also been used metaphorically in modern contexts to describe any large, unyielding entity or system that consumes resources or lives, often with negative connotations. For example, it can refer to bureaucratic systems that are seen as oppressive or dehumanizing.

      Whatever you call it, that thing has to die or the biosphere will die.

      This Moloch is not actually animate. It is running on, and made up of, human actions. Thinking about what it would take for Moloch to die, or to be converted to something that it is no longer functional, involves creating interactions where you cannot assess all types of value with a single value currency.

      For example, a dollar bill is ordinarily fungible, that is, it is exchangeable for any other dollar bill. It is not unique. It represents the same value as any other dollar bill.

      For Moloch to die we would need to implement a currency with which you cannot assess all types of value. Then real types of value cannot be measured. Then you cannot destroy real value to get the optionality token for value that that real thing is.

      There would need to be no global fungible, exchangeable currency with its own internal financial mechanisms, such as interest, which create embedded growth obligations.

      Because there is no system that has internal financial structures common today that is compatible with human continuance on Earth.

      This Moloch thing has to die.

      If you get this, you either live in internally shredded numbness, self-generated confusion, and cognitive dissonence, or you dedicate your life to changing that thing. You can no longer be an accomplice to Moloch. You decide not to operate inside of that thing anymore. Your world orbits around figuring out how to demolish Moloch.

      You decide, "I am unwilling to be complicit with an omnicidal system."

    • The Context Of Regenerative Archan Cultures

      There is no gradual shift from Patriarchy to Archiarchy, just as there is no gradual shift from driving a Mercedes to driving a BMW. You are either driving a Mercedes, or you are driving a BMW.

      The Space determines what is Possible.

      The Context determines the Space.

      The Spaceholder determines the Context.

      Archiarchy is contexted in Radical Responsibility and centered on Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes.

      Anything that is not Regenerative is illegal.

    • Proposals For Reorder Experiments To Try

      An evolutionary gameworld must also evolve.

      - Clinton Callahan

      THE IMPORTANCE OF BEING CLEAR ABOUT WHERE YOU ARE GOING

      If you succeed in extracting yourself from the self-consuming systems of modern culture, then what culture will you move into? How will you recognize yourself? Your worth? What is your new identity?

      If a transformation does not already provide a new context in which to bridge you, then is equates to taking away everything known and giving you only nothing in return, which could feel even worse.

      Yes, it would be possible for you to start over from nothing as no one and create an entirely regenerative human culture on Earth, but... it is not very likey.

      More likely, the habit patterns left in your brain from decades of using Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) would keep echoing around in the void. More and more of your attention and energy would flow into those old grooves. Then, before you know it, the transformation would be effectively reversed and you would be back in the Zombie slave pits with all your old pals. Who would even remember?

      ORIENTING TOWARDS THE BIG PICTURE

      Magic is in the details.

      But changing details does not necessarily transform the big picture.

      And if the big picture does not change, your neurotic little changes in the details end up being pointless.

      You may spend your time, energy, money, and attention picking up plastic from the beaches, wearing hemp clothing, using biodegradable soap to wash your dishes by hand, hanging out your laundry to dry in the sun, riding your bicycle instead of driving in a car, avoiding flying in airplanes for your vacations and instead hike from your front door to your vacation destination...

      And yet, if the atmospheric methane concentration does not decrease from its current 2000 parts per billion and climbing, we are all toast, and your efforts will have been for naught. Your grandchildren may never be born.

      "I am only a single person. I have no power to make anything different," say eight billion people...

      You have far more agency than you know. Why?

      Did you ever think of a new idea?

      Yes.

      Did you know what the new idea would be before you thought of it?

      No.

      There are powerful new ideas you have not thought of yet, and therefore have not tried yet, which could reorder the entire system.

      Yes?

      So then, keep trying to figure out what your next Experiment could be.

      If you try something and it does not work, figure out the next thing you could try.

      Of course you will need to look in new corners of the Universe to find the next thing to try. And if you don't think of something right now to try, then go talk to someone else who is trying to figure it out and ask them for their latest ideas. Try to figure it out together.

      Try your next new idea together, as a Team.

      "Wherever two or more people gather in the name of the Bright Principle of Possibility, there it is in the midst of them!"

      Look at the field of people, information, and demands on your attention you have surrounded yourself with. Whatever you surround yourself with will always use up 100% of your time energy and attention, right? So why not surround yourself with people and information you need to figure out the next thing you can try to reorder the whole system?

      Your commitment and courage will call forth archetypal forces to your aid, Bright Principles, Archetypal Lineages, impossible coincidences from the Earth Coincidence Control Office (E.C.C.O.). Why? Because you are serving the world, not just yourself. You are serving something greater than your own survival. Do you think the Universe does not notice this? Do you think Gaia does not want you to win?

      Your are designed to inhabit and interact with the Archetypal Domains. These are extraordinary forces that can flow through you into your field of life and into your efforts and your Experiments.

      Find out what Baggage you carry, and what Energetic Blocks you have installed, and what Past Life Vows you made that interfere with your access to the Archetypal Domains, and clean them up. What an incredible difference this makes! It is like looking through freshly cleaned windows after a mud storm! Get your Voice back! Get your Sword Of Clarity back!

      As you make more and more changes in the big picture, you may discover that the change in the small picture take place all by themselves, automatically, by reflex.

      But, sorry. You will still have to take a shower, and carry out the garbage...
